title: rubus × aequidentatus
intro: Rubus × aequidentatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry-bumblebee raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × aequidentatus include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and stems, then steeping them in hot water or mixing with a solvent like ethanol.
